div.head: [723] *A.
div.p:
Goods shipped: Shenandoah, confederate war steamer,
Bought of H. B. Donaldson & Co.,

row.cell: To 100 2/16 feet 6 x 1⅛ T x G flooring = 1,200 feet, 30s
To 3/24 feet 3 x 3 red pine = 75 feet, 30s

295 feet 4 inches,

To 2 Only drawer-locks. 3s. 6d.—6s.: 3 Only drawer-locks, 7s
To 1 set clocks, £9 6s
sail-makers’ department.

To 2 boatswain’s calls, silver, 18s
